n={"","\068\115\068\090\082\053\068\117\068\102\068\120\051\081\083\110\075\104\066\061";"\051\105\054\057\116\113\069\081\100\090\122\120\116\084\061\061","\068\115\065\071\069\066\068\118\047\102\057\082\103\090\121\120";"\116\101\110\117\051\098\088\061","\085\082\066\083\074\053\065\082\078\109\065\102\078\081\110\079";"\116\090\121\114\051\098\088\061","\074\102\068\081\075\104\065\069\082\078\052\053\074\083\077\083\051\084\061\061","\108\049\061\061";"\116\086\109\052\116\071\061\061";"\076\086\057\057\100\049\061\061","\068\047\057\104\051\071\061\061","\068\105\054\120\068\047\083\055\116\101\088\061","\101\083\054\118\116\047\070\061";"\068\105\054\115\068\113\110\077\051\090\100\061","\068\086\121\090\075\047\122\117\074\098\057\084\074\053\057\071","\075\066\079\077\103\122\097\104\074\049\061\061";"\078\047\110\119\108\066\077\098\068\053\054\065\075\098\071\081\116\081\084\061";"\100\090\109\120\116\105\054\052","\068\047\079\084\076\047\069\067","\076\086\054\120\076\086\109\081";"\076\050\122\081\116\071\061\061","\075\086\052\070\100\104\069\114\051\098\068\107\100\086\082\089\051\090\066\061","\100\081\052\067\116\109\069\076\119\086\057\098\051\113\077\110\103\102\049\061","\100\090\082\052\051\098\116\122";"\068\105\109\055\051\105\078\061";"\051\102\088\061";"\051\105\082\120","\100\098\065\117\075\047\079\050";"\108\055\049\122\116\073\112\077\108\049\061\061","\100\086\082\081\051\047\082\081\076\101\065\057\076\090\121\122","\056\108\103\072\068\053\065\050\053\115\119\080\080\048\106\089\110\054\084\100\055\114\121\049\118\090\103\101\106\057\080\057\070\049\085\116\104\056\054\109\048\090\122\086";"\065\050\071\070\082\082\071\084\082\115\057\070\051\081\082\089\051\081\084\061";"\051\102\066\061";"\100\104\065\118\047\113\065\109\071\050\110\085\047\090\052\107\051\090\119\061";"\116\086\083\057\068\105\069\112";"\116\098\069\083\076\049\061\061","\082\105\109\052\100\105\082\117\088\066\065\122\068\105\082\104\068\105\082\053\088\071\061\
